analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet congratulates and wishes the UK success as it leaves the EU, expressing optimism about future opportunities. Evaluation against US narratives: US1 (honorable tradition) – not referenced; no mention of US history or values. US2 (admirable society) – no mention of US society, groups, or heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) – no adversary framed. US4 (force for good) – no claim about US supporting rights or peace; it's a generic well-wish to the UK. US5 (great international ally) – while it expresses goodwill toward the UK, it does not explicitly state US support, alliance commitments, or US-UK relations; it could be from any speaker and does not portray the US as an ally. US6 (at the forefront) – no leadership claims about the US. Therefore, none of the listed US narratives are promoted.
